status: executable development contract (operator superset); physical-board validation pending

pl_fft_abi.description: proposed ARM-visible P210 PL accelerator contract implemented by the digital twin
pl_fft_abi.input_order: I0[n], Q0[n], I1[n], Q1[n], then n+1
pl_fft_abi.output_format: uint32 little-endian linear power, channel-major, natural bin order
pl_fft_abi.output_order: all bins for selected channels in ascending channel number
pl_fft_abi.scaling: divide every radix-2 butterfly result by two
pl_fft_abi.dma_coherency: non-coherent; physical hardware requires DMA-safe allocation and cache maintenance

operator.description: Spectral neural-operator mode: forward FFT, per-mode complex table multiply, inverse FFT, pointwise local path, modReLU. The PL multiplies precomputed tables and never evaluates the rational z-plane kernel; the ARM/host evaluates the kernel per current N and sample rate and loads the tables. This keeps the ABI parameterization- and task-agnostic.
operator.complex_output_format: signed IQ16 little-endian (or IQ32 when COMPLEX_OUT_IQ32 negotiated), natural bin order, channel-major, to OUTPUT2_ADDR; power output (v1 format) remains at OUTPUT_ADDR when OUTPUT_MODE is POWER or BOTH
operator.pole_radius_cap_note: 1 - 2^-7, coupled to interpolation grid 4096 and 2 MB banks
operator.log2n_validity: each weight bank declares [log2n_min, log2n_max] in its header; the engine rejects START with BAD_OP_CONFIG if LOG2_N is outside the active bank's certified range. The certified aliasing bound is the honest 2 R rho^N / (1 - rho), not the naive rho^N <= eps shortcut.
operator.op_mode_count_rule: OP_MODE_COUNT must satisfy 256 <= M <= min(4096, 2^LOG2_N); else BAD_MODE_COUNT
operator.modrelu_threshold_units: applied in exponent-compensated (block-scaled) units so the gate is independent of the block exponent; sim, twin, and RTL must model this identically
operator.renormalization: per-layer 1/N block-exponent reinsertion after each forward+inverse round trip
operator.reset_state: BYPASS set, OUTPUT_MODE POWER_U32: bit-exact v1
operator.rtl_fidelity: the twin device model reuses the v1 int32/Q2.30 integer FFT path, so twin behavior is bit-exact and gate-enforced; a future RTL bitstream is bounded-error (<= 1 LSB of 0.01 dB post-log) against a versioned golden, never bit-exact -- matching the int32/Q2.30 arithmetic in fabric would cost ~180 DSP48E1

operator_memory_map.weight_region_note: up to four double-buffered 2 MB banks
operator_memory_map.scratch_note: device-owned: dense-expanded per-N tables (written at WEIGHT_ACTIVATE) and hidden state; included in all overlap/bounds checks (SCRATCH_RANGE)
operator_memory_map.ddr_requirement_note: the operator carve-out extends to ~398 MB, so total DDR must be >= 512 MB; the twin rejects the carve-out at device init if RAM is smaller

runtime_inputs.composition: public P210 kernel/device tree plus official PlutoSDR v0.39 initramfs
runtime_inputs.classification: ABI-compatible experimental composition; not vendor P210 firmware

superset_note: Strict superset of v1: every v1 field is preserved unchanged. v2 adds the spectral neural-operator mode behind new CAPABILITIES bits. The register major version stays 1 (0x00010001, minor bump): the shipping guest hard-rejects any other major, so v2 is discovered via CAPABILITIES, not VERSION. Reset state is bit-exact v1 (bypass + power output).

bank_format.addressing: content-addressed sha256 of the serialized bank
bank_format.integrity: CRC32 over the body, checked before DMA activation (BANK_INTEGRITY on mismatch)

load_protocol: host DMAs the bank blob into weight_region_base and writes WEIGHT_ADDR/WEIGHT_BYTES/WEIGHT_BANK/WEIGHT_SEQUENCE/WEIGHT_CRC
engine verifies CRC32; on mismatch sets BANK_CRC_FAIL and stays in bypass (BANK_INTEGRITY)
host asserts WEIGHT_ACTIVATE; engine dense-expands tables into scratch at a block boundary and sets WEIGHT_READY
each completed block latches RESULT_WEIGHT_CRC/RESULT_WEIGHT_SEQ so the host can attribute every result to the exact bank that produced it
operator_weight_banks.safety: BYPASS (identity) is the reset default and always reachable; telemetry (TELEM_*) is monitoring-only by contract and all reward terms are recomputed host-side from the DMA output buffers; a host-side gain/probe check precedes activation
